name: ONEOK INC /NEW/
summary: PART I GENERAL We are incorporated under the laws of the state of Oklahoma, and our common stock is listed on the NYSE under the trading symbol OKE. We deliver energy products and services vital to an advancing world. We are a leading midstream service provider of gathering, processing, fractionation, transportation, storage and marine export services. As one of the largest integrated energy infrastructure companies in North America, we are delivering energy that makes a difference in the lives ...
